summary: Full backend + frontend review for ECHO app. 15/15 pytest backend tests pass covering health, voices (9 voices, id/name/tag), sample-text, TTS (success + empty-400 + >4000-413 + invalid-voice-fallback), parse-file (.txt, .md, unsupported-415, empty-400), drafts + transcripts round-trip (no _id leak), and STT (round-trip using TTS-generated mp3). Frontend Playwright run on mobile viewport (390x844) confirmed: readback-header, draft-intake-panel, transport-panel, readback-pane, load-sample-button, clear-button, text-intake-input, play-pause-button all visible; SAMPLE populates input (183 chars); all 9 voice chips present; all 4 speed chips (0.75/1/1.25/1.5) render and are tappable; PLAY triggers TTS and words render inside readback-pane; CLEAR empties; DICTATION tab reveals dictation-stage, record-button, record-timer (00:00.0), transcript-console, privacy-note, import-audio-button, clear-transcript-button; tab switching preserves app stability (no red screen).

issues: Console warning: TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated (used in readback.tsx) — cosmetic, migrate to Pressable eventually
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents) — cosmetic
[expo-av] deprecation warnings: expo-av will be removed in SDK 54; plan migration to expo-audio/expo-video

Expo version mismatch warnings on startup for expo-audio, expo-clipboard, expo-document-picker, expo-file-system, expo-sharing — no runtime impact observed but should be aligned via `npx expo install --check` before release

action_items: Optional: replace TouchableWithoutFeedback with Pressable in readback.tsx to silence deprecation warning
Optional: migrate expo-av usage to expo-audio (SDK 54 deprecation) — not required for current scope
Optional: run `npx expo install --check` to align expo-* package versions
critical_code_review_comments: server.py cleanly excludes MongoDB _id via projection {_id: 0} in both /drafts and /transcripts list endpoints — verified no leakage.
TTS char limit enforced at 4000 with 413 response matching spec; empty text yields 400.
Word-timing estimation is heuristic (char-weighted + punctuation pause) and scales with speed — reasonable for UI highlighting since OpenAI tts-1 has no native timestamp output.
Frontend api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly; no hardcoded URLs. All interactive elements have testIDs.
server.py is 445 lines (under the 700-line guideline) and well-structured; no DRY violations.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on targeted flows (record-audio flow intentionally skipped — requires mic device)

seed_data_creation: Inserted TEST_ prefixed draft and a transcript row via round-trip tests; minimal, does not pollute production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints green. Record flow in dictation tab not exercisable via Playwright (needs mic). If future iterations add history/playback screens or ElevenLabs, extend test_echo_api.py. Transcribe test reuses TTS-generated mp3 as Whisper input — works well with emergentintegrations OpenAISpeechToText.
